economic_notes: Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation is a related incorporated enterprise accounted for at cost ($100) and excluded from consolidation. Nation is under Third Party Management as of 2022 (TPM cash of $1,591,464). Contingent liability as co-borrower on demand loan with Bridging Finance Inc. with balance of $10,207,930 as of August 2023 in payment default.
notes: Audit disclaimer of opinion issued (not a qualified opinion but a full disclaimer) due to significant weaknesses in internal controls across cash, accounts receivable, investments, tangible capital assets, accounts payable, contingencies, payroll, revenue and expenditures. Nation was under Third Party Management during 2022. Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation excluded from consolidation and recorded at cost of $100 only. Contingent liability as co-borrower on Bridging Finance Inc. loan in payment default with $10,207,930 balance as of August 2023. No schedule of remuneration included. OSR is negative due to deferred revenue netting treatment. Consolidated entity includes Government, Post Secondary, CMHC Housing Authority, and Health Authority. No budget prepared for the year. Financial statements issued February 16, 2024 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 — nearly two years late.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
